message:
build(deps): bump rusqlite 0.33→0.38, rcgen 0.13→0.14

- rusqlite 0.38: includes SQLite 3.47 with improved JSON and FTS5
  performance; bundled feature remains for portability
- rcgen 0.14: updated certificate generation API for TLS/QUIC tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
